name: Majestic Fairways
about: Majestic Fairways is a member-oriented golf simulator facility located in Payson, UT. It focuses on providing a personalized golfing experience using state-of-the-art TrackMan technology for self-play, practice, and professional lessons. The venue operates on a membership basis, with tee times available in 50-minute increments and a strong emphasis on member convenience and control over the experience. While the facility includes a putting green and lounge area, there is no explicit mention of a full bar or kitchen on-site.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan 4 technology for precise data tracking
Access to over 100 world-class golf courses from around the globe
Flexible booking system for self-practice and lessons on your own schedule

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of food service or kitchen.
No mention of an on-site bar or alcohol service.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator with 26 club and ball data points and three camera angles.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: The FAQ does not mention club rental, so it is recommended to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, so bringing your own may be allowed, but this is not explicitly confirmed.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Tee times are blocked in 50-minute increments, with 10 minutes between sessions. Playing 18 holes would likely take at least 50 minutes, but the exact time depends on the course and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any specific amenities or policies for children, so it is unclear if the venue is kid-friendly.
